ideas.title: Orbit Catcher
ideas.creator: spark
ideas.one_liner: Tap to drop a gravity well that captures orbiting debris — chain captures to clear rings before they spiral out

ideas.title: Pinch Bridge
ideas.creator: spark
ideas.one_liner: Pinch two fingers to stretch a bridge segment — release to lock it. Guide rolling balls across your bridges before they collapse under weight.

ideas.title: Valve Panic
ideas.creator: spark
ideas.one_liner: Tap-and-hold valves to release pressure from overloading pipes — let go too early and pressure rebuilds, too late and you miss the next pipe about to burst

ideas.title: Shockwave Hop
ideas.creator: spark
ideas.one_liner: Tap to jump over expanding shockwave rings — each ring you clear sends a counter-shockwave that destroys nearby hazards for bonus points

ideas.title: Fuse Trail
ideas.creator: spark
ideas.one_liner: Tap rapidly to keep a burning fuse alive as it races toward dynamite — reach the target before the flame dies, then watch the chain explosion

ideas.title: Gear Grind
ideas.creator: spark
ideas.one_liner: Drag gears into position to transfer rotation from a spinning motor to a stuck machine — wrong meshing jams the system and costs you time

ideas.title: Lint Roller Frenzy
ideas.creator: oddball
ideas.one_liner: You ARE a lint roller rolling across increasingly hairy surfaces — swipe to roll, tap to peel, don't let the lint win

ideas.title: Bubble Wrap Pop
ideas.creator: oddball
ideas.one_liner: Pop inflating bubbles before they burst — chain same-color pops for combos, avoid duds that cost lives

ideas.title: Parking Lot Panic
ideas.creator: oddball
ideas.one_liner: Swipe cars into matching parking spots before the entrance jams — wrong size in wrong spot wastes precious space

ideas.title: Sneeze Catcher
ideas.creator: oddball
ideas.one_liner: Catch sneezes with tissues before germs spread — miss one and chain sneezes cascade across the screen

ideas.title: Elevator Rush
ideas.creator: oddball
ideas.one_liner: Stop your elevator at the right floors to pick up and deliver passengers — overfill it and the cable snaps

ideas.title: Zipper Dash
ideas.creator: oddball
ideas.one_liner: Race a zipper pull down a jacket — zip fast for speed, unzip to dodge obstacles, jam and you're done

ideas.title: Taxi Drift Stack
ideas.creator: trendsetter
ideas.one_liner: Hold to drift a taxi around corners, release to fling passengers onto rooftop targets

ideas.title: Balloon Pump Panic
ideas.creator: trendsetter
ideas.one_liner: Rapid-tap to inflate balloons — pop for points but push too far and it flies away

ideas.title: Conveyor Crunch
ideas.creator: trendsetter
ideas.one_liner: Swipe items left or right on a conveyor belt into correct bins before they pile up

ideas.title: Meteor Munch
ideas.creator: trendsetter
ideas.one_liner: Hold to open your space creature's mouth, release to chomp passing meteors — avoid poison rocks

ideas.title: Parkour Tap
ideas.creator: trendsetter
ideas.one_liner: Tap to vault, slide, and wall-jump through a parkour course — perfect timing chains into smooth flow

ideas.title: Glass Walk
ideas.creator: trendsetter
ideas.one_liner: Pick the safe glass panel to step on — wrong choice shatters beneath your feet

ideas.title: Signal Splice
ideas.creator: puzzler
ideas.one_liner: Route colored signals through a grid by placing and rotating splitter tiles before the signal fires

ideas.title: Hex Collapse
ideas.creator: puzzler
ideas.one_liner: Tap hexagonal clusters of 3+ same-colored hexes to collapse them before the grid fills up from the edges

ideas.title: Tile Alchemy
ideas.creator: puzzler
ideas.one_liner: Merge elemental tiles on a 4x4 grid following alchemy rules to create the target compound before moves run out

ideas.title: Loop Lock
ideas.creator: puzzler
ideas.one_liner: Rotate pipe segments on a grid to form closed loops — every pipe must be part of a loop or the grid floods

ideas.title: Digit Duel
ideas.creator: puzzler
ideas.one_liner: Place digits 1-9 on a 3x3 grid to beat the opponent's row/column sums — a fast tactical number battle

ideas.title: Gravity Slide
ideas.creator: puzzler
ideas.one_liner: Flip gravity direction on a grid to slide blocks into target positions — fewer flips = higher score

ideas.title: Reverse Mirror
ideas.creator: visionary
ideas.one_liner: Your reflection controls YOU — swipe to fight against your own mirrored movements

ideas.title: Lie Detector
ideas.creator: visionary
ideas.one_liner: The game tells you instructions — but some are LIES. Obey truth, defy lies, or die.

ideas.title: Gravity Auction
ideas.creator: visionary
ideas.one_liner: Bid your score points to BUY gravity direction — highest bidder controls physics for everyone

ideas.title: Shrink Panic
ideas.creator: visionary
ideas.one_liner: Your game screen PHYSICALLY SHRINKS every second — tap targets before your viewport disappears completely

ideas.title: Time Thief
ideas.creator: visionary
ideas.one_liner: STEAL seconds from obstacles to add to your countdown timer — every enemy is also your lifeline

ideas.title: Emotion Engine
ideas.creator: visionary
ideas.one_liner: Draw the EMOTION the game demands — angry scribbles, calm circles, sad droops — judged by shape analysis
